  clojure-mode is an emacs editing mode for the clojure

  WWW: http://clojure.codestuffs.com/
  
  PR:             ports/129857
  Submitted by:   Peter Schuller <peter.schuller at infidyne.com>
  Approved by:    araujo (mentor, implicit)
